questions.question: What Asian people traditionally believe there to be a toad on the moon, instead of a man?

What golfer did Sports Illustrated call the "all-time Tour leader in divorces, rehabs, addictions, problems, excuses and comebacks"?
What's the "Q" short for in Q-Tips?
